context: Tests whether the agent correctly configures HTTP security headers and a nonce-based Content Security Policy for a Next.js e-commerce application, including HSTS with the right parameters, checkout-specific headers, and a strict CSP generated in middleware.

checklist.name: HSTS max-age value
checklist.description: Strict-Transport-Security header has max-age=63072000 (exactly 2 years, not a shorter value like 31536000)

checklist.name: HSTS includeSubDomains
checklist.description: Strict-Transport-Security header includes the includeSubDomains directive

checklist.name: HSTS preload
checklist.description: Strict-Transport-Security header includes the preload directive

checklist.name: X-Frame-Options DENY
checklist.description: X-Frame-Options header is set to DENY (not SAMEORIGIN)

checklist.name: X-Content-Type-Options
checklist.description: X-Content-Type-Options header is set to nosniff

checklist.name: Referrer-Policy value
checklist.description: Referrer-Policy header is set to strict-origin-when-cross-origin

checklist.name: Permissions-Policy camera/mic/geo
checklist.description: Permissions-Policy header disables camera=(), microphone=(), and geolocation=()

checklist.name: Global headers route pattern
checklist.description: Security headers are applied to all routes using source: '/(.*)'  in next.config.ts

checklist.name: Checkout Cache-Control
checklist.description: Checkout routes have Cache-Control set to no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate

checklist.name: Checkout X-Robots-Tag
checklist.description: Checkout routes have X-Robots-Tag set to noindex

checklist.name: Nonce per request
checklist.description: CSP nonce is generated uniquely per request in middleware (e.g., using crypto.randomUUID() encoded as base64), not statically

checklist.name: CSP in middleware
checklist.description: Content-Security-Policy header is set inside Next.js middleware (not statically in next.config.ts)

checklist.name: CSP nonce in script-src
checklist.description: CSP script-src directive includes the nonce value (nonce-${nonce}) rather than 'unsafe-inline'

checklist.name: CSP Stripe frame-src
checklist.description: CSP frame-src includes both https://js.stripe.com and https://hooks.stripe.com

checklist.name: unsafe-eval dev-only
checklist.description: CSP 'unsafe-eval' is only included in development (gated on NODE_ENV check), not hardcoded unconditionally
